title: Review: relay/daemon/cli/mls round 22
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — Four P0 correctness bugs found across the payment subsystem and daemon event dispatch. The diversifier-before-invoice ordering and the stream exhaustion/error conflation affect the payment flow. The no-store MessageRetracted event and handle_send UUID fallback affect daemon contract correctness. Several P1 risks involve lock scope, missing field in public event types, and unbounded query results.
Confidence: 25% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) ws.rs not fully read — only the SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST and alloc_subscription_address sections were reviewed; (2) payment_watcher block-stream behavior depends on LightwalletdClient stream semantics which were not read; (3) MLS process_for_group sender_pub_id for Commit path (nie-s4qr.8 overlap) not fully re-examined. Would raise confidence if: full ws.rs relay handler read (it is the largest file), test coverage for payment_watcher stream exhaustion vs error paths, and LightwalletdClient stream interface read to confirm Ok(None) semantics.
